title: Local Studio Fitness & Corporate Careers | Pure Barre
meta_description: Are you ready to raise the barre in your career? Join a supportive studio team that inspires our clients to achieve their fitness goals. Browse open jobs.
body_markdown:
# 
Careers 
Pure Barre is more than just a workout; it’s a way of life. We are focused on improving, strengthening, and transforming the lives of our clients and dynamic talent is always welcome on our team. 
![Group working out with wrist weights and dumbbells ](https://4194181.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hubfs/4194181/teacher_image_3_resized2.jpg)
![pb_icon](https://4194181.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hub/4194181/hubfs/pb_icon.png?width=60&height=60&name=pb_icon.png)
##  Got what it takes to be part of an amazing and passionate team?
Pure Barre has incredible career opportunities in our franchise-owned studios nationwide. Check out our open positions below or apply in person at your local Pure Barre studio.
![Person smiling behind front desk at Pure Barre](https://4194181.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hubfs/4194181/staff_image_4_resized2.jpg)
![](https://www.purebarre.com/careers)
##  Studio Manager 
Pure Barre Studio Managers play a critical role in the success of Pure Barre. You will be responsible for driving sales and service excellence for our boutique fitness studio. This is the perfect opportunity to interact with clients on a daily basis to build our studio community. 
[ Apply Now ](https://pure-barre-careers.careerplug.com/jobs?amp_device_id=GY7Ovpp4P4KjS-PnGOiVpT#job_filters)
![Person smiling next to Pure Barre merchandise](https://4194181.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hubfs/4194181/staff_image_2_resized2.jpg)
![](https://www.purebarre.com/careers)
##  Sales Associate
Pure Barre Sales Associates have the important role of engaging with clients on a daily basis to build the Pure Barre brand. This is the perfect opportunity for someone who is passionate about fitness and wellness and changing the lives of our clients.
[ Apply Now ](https://pure-barre-careers.careerplug.com/jobs?amp_device_id=GY7Ovpp4P4KjS-PnGOiVpT#job_filters)
![Pure Barre instructor smiling at group taking a break from workout](https://4194181.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hubfs/4194181/teacher_image_2resized2.jpg)
![](https://www.purebarre.com/careers)
##  Teacher 
Pure Barre Teachers are the lifeblood of our brand. We are looking for high-energy individuals who are passionate about fitness and changing the lives of those around them. You will be responsible for teaching a minimum of five classes per week. 
[ Apply Now ](https://pure-barre-careers.careerplug.com/jobs?amp_device_id=GY7Ovpp4P4KjS-PnGOiVpT#job_filters) [ Local Studio ](https://lp.purebarre.com/teacherinquiry?amp_device_id=GY7Ovpp4P4KjS-PnGOiVpT)
## Our Core Values
Pure Barre is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity and Affirmative Action employer. Pure Barre does not discriminate in employment on the basis of race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy and gender identity), national origin, political affiliation, sexual orientation, marital status, disability, genetic information, age, membership in an employee organization, retaliation, parental status, military service, or other non-merit factor. We are dedicated to providing a work environment free from discrimination and harassment where employees are treated with respect and dignity 
![Yoga mat and dumbbell](https://4194181.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hub/4194181/hubfs/CareerPageUpdatedIcons_technique.png?width=198&name=CareerPageUpdatedIcons_technique.png)
  
Technique
![Fist bump](https://4194181.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hub/4194181/hubfs/CareerPageUpdatedIcons_Empowerment.png?width=198&name=CareerPageUpdatedIcons_Empowerment.png)
  
Empowerment

Authenticity
![Heart hovering over open hand](https://4194181.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hub/4194181/hubfs/CareerPageUpdatedIcons_community.png?width=198&name=CareerPageUpdatedIcons_community.png)
  
Community
